description: Style NoteWear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product DetailsBlue kurta, has side slits, a mandarin collar with a V-neck, three quarter sleeves with panelling and embroidery at the cuffs, mustard brown panels at the shoulders in front with stitched detailing, black panel around the V neckline, red printed panels on either side in the front and back and embroidery above the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
